ORDER GRANTING WELLS FARGO BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. WELLS FARGO IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT IN ITS FAVOR AND AGAINST DEFENDANTS CHARLES DIDALEUSKY AND LOUIS HORNBERGER IN THE AMOUNT OF $62,030.34. ORDER IS SIGNED. PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF JUDGMENT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2018 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2018 Set For Case Management Conference On Jun-27-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-21-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Anne Schauerman, Esq. of the Ofice of the General Counsel for Plaintiff WELLS FARGO BANK through court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, National Association's motion for summary judgment is granted. No opposition filed. Wells Fargo is entitled to judgment in its favor and against defendants Charles Didaleusky and Louis Hornberger in the amount of $62,030.34.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details). Plaintiff to submit a proposed form of Judgment

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/HK)
